project_name: RageMP Web Admin Panel - GTA V RP

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-display uppercase tracking-wider text-white drop-shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-heading font-bold tracking-tight text-white

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align data and text. Center-align only massive stat numbers.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050507]/80 border-b border-white/10 z-50 sticky top-0
surface_strategies.cards: Solid Tactical: bg-[#0A0A0D] border border-white/5. Hover state adds subtle -translate-y-1 and glow border-white/20.
surface_strategies.buttons: Brutalist Sharp: rounded-none. Primary buttons use bg-[#FFD600] text-black hover:bg-[#FFEA00]. Secondary use transparent bg with border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 hover:text-white.
surface_strategies.console: Retro-Futurist Terminal: bg-[#050505] border border-[#00E5FF]/30 p-6 shadow-[inset_0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.05)]
surface_strategies.inputs: Flat and dark: bg-[#050507] border-white/10 focus:border-[#FFD600] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFD600] text-white transition-all

components.tables: Dense rows for high data visibility. Table headers uppercase and muted. Hovering over a row highlights it with bg-white/5. Data cells use JetBrains Mono.
components.badges: Sharp corners (rounded-sm), strong saturated backgrounds with 20% opacity and solid borders (e.g., bg-red-500/20 border border-red-500 text-red-500 for SMURD).
components.tabs: Underline style with active tab receiving a glowing bottom border of #00E5FF. Inactive tabs are muted gray.
components.notifications: Sonner toasts placed top-right. Styled as GTA in-game phone notifications: dark bg, colored left border (red for error, green for success, cyan for info).
components.dialogs: Dark backdrop blur, modal bg #0A0A0D, sharp borders, clear typography.

pages.dashboard: Live stats bento grid. Top 4 cards: Jucatori Online, Total Masini, Total Case, Total Afaceri. Large countdown timer for 'Urmatorul PayDay'. Mini live-feed of server events.
pages.factions: Grid of faction cards. Factions included: Politia Romana, Politia Locala, Politia Animalelor, SMURD, Clanuri (Europeni, Americani, Rusi, Asiatici, Africani), Vanzatori. Show members count and leader.
pages.players: CRUD Table: Jucatori. Columns: ID, Nume, Nivel, Bani, Factiune, Cont Bancar. Filters for online status and faction. Action menu (Dropdown) for edit/ban.
pages.cars: Grid of vehicle cards or dense table. Proprietar, Model, Numar Inmatriculare (Plate), Locatie (Map coordinates or Zone).
pages.houses: Cards showing exterior/interior placeholder, Nume Proprietar, Adresa, Pret, and interior type.
pages.businesses: Data list: Tip Afacere (Gas Station, 24/7, etc.), Proprietar, Venit Zilnic, Status (Deschis/Inchis).
pages.payday: Config form for global economy: Taxa Venit (%), Taxa CAS (%), Bonus Factiune. History table of PayDay logs.
pages.elections: Voting dashboard. Current President banner with large photo/avatar. Live votes progress bars. Controls for President to set taxes (suma1: 0-5000, suma2: 0-1000).
pages.console: Terminal UI for RageMP commands. Shows command docs (/euvotez [nume], /cumparamasina) and server console logs.

motion.page_transition: Simple opacity fade. No heavy animations to keep it feeling like a fast, tactical admin panel.
motion.alerts: Slide in from right, swift and snappy.

dashboard_bg.description: Night city skyline with glowing lights. Used as a subtle fixed parallax background for the dashboard (opacity 5-10%).

faction_police.description: Police car at night, use for Police Faction banner/card.

cars_header.description: Red sports car at night, use as header/hero image for Personal Cars page.

street_clans.description: Street car racing night, use for Clans/Gangs section.

icons.rules: Use sharp, unfilled icons. Default size 20 or 24. Match icon color to text or neon accent. For critical actions use Accent Red (#FF3B30).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over primary yellow (#FFD600) MUST be black. Use APCA contrast rules.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, nav links, and form inputs MUST include data-testid attribute. Format: data-testid='[action]-[entity]-[type]' (e.g., data-testid='save-payday-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. WEB PANEL: Build the React/Tailwind frontend using Shadcn UI. Override Shadcn defaults in tailwind.config.js to match the dark/neon tactical theme.
2. WEB PANEL: Do NOT use generic purple/white gradients. Stick to the Asphalt/Cyan/Yellow palette.
3. WEB PANEL: Install fonts: @fontsource/anton, @fontsource/outfit, @fontsource/jetbrains-mono. Add lucide-react for icons.
4. WEB PANEL: Ensure the entire interface is in Romanian (e.g., 'Jucatori', 'Factiuni', 'Alegeri').
5. WEB PANEL: Apply data-testid rigorously across the UI.
6. GAME SERVER: Implement the backend RageMP server logic (C#/JS) + MySQL database.
7. GAME SERVER: Build the 9 specific factions: Politia Romana, Politia Locala, Politia Animalelor, SMURD, 5 clanuri (europeni, americani, rusi, asiatici, africani), Vanzatori.
8. GAME SERVER: Implement personal cars, houses, and businesses systems.
9. GAME SERVER: Implement hourly PayDay with formula: (lvl * 1000) + random(999), factoring in impozit pe venit, impozit CAS, bonus factiune.
10. GAME SERVER: Implement Election system /euvotez [nume_jucator] every Sunday.
11. GAME SERVER: Implement President controls for taxes with strict limits: suma1 (0-5000), suma2 (0-1000).
